item.title: It’s so interesting how often they will lie about this being an empire and then when it comes to discussing between themselves t...
item.description:
It’s so interesting how often they will lie about this being an empire and then when it comes to discussing between themselves they will be open and honest#greenscreenvideo

item.title: I get getting things wrong, if you are going to be critical of people for sharing things you perceive to be iranian propaganda y...
item.description:
I get getting things wrong, if you are going to be critical of people for sharing things you perceive to be iranian propaganda you must be critical of yourself when you share what does end up being pro imperial propaganda

item.title: The debate is not whether you think America should be an ethnonational state, to you the question is how should it be?#greenscre...
